name: Stir-Fried Shredded Beef with Fish-Flavored S
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the beef and shred it thinly.
2. Marinate the beef shreds with soy sauce and cornstarch for 10 minutes.
3. Rinse the water chestnuts, peel them, and dice them.
4. Mix the diced water chestnuts with salt, sugar, soy sauce, dark vinegar, pepper powder, and sesame oil.
5. Heat oil in a wok until hot.
6. Quickly stir-fry the beef shreds in the hot oil until they turn white.
7. Remove the beef and drain any excess oil from the wok.
8. Stir-fry spring onions, ginger, and garlic for a few seconds.
9. Add the diced water chestnuts and chili Nam Yuey to the wok and stir-fry for a few seconds.
10. Add the shredded beef back into the wok.
11. Mix in the seasoning (soy sauce, cornstarch paste, and sesame oil).
12. Stir until the mixture is pasty.
13. Remove from heat and serve.
